nasb.text: On the west side, 4,500 cubits, shall be three gates: the gate of Gad, one; the gate of Asher, one; the gate of Naphtali, one.

esv.text: On the west side, which is to be 4,500 cubits, three gates, the gate of Gad, the gate of Asher, and the gate of Naphtali.

cnv.text: 西面的長度是二千二百五十公尺，也有三個門口，一個是迦得門，一個是亞設門，一個是拿弗他利門。

ccb.text: 西面的墙是二点五公里长，有三道门，分别是迦得门、亚设门和拿弗他利门。
